---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report maintenance tasks, refactoring, or technical debt
title: 'Maintenance: '
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Maintenance Type
- [ ] Code Refactoring
- [ ] Dependency Updates
- [ ] Performance Optimization
- [ ] Technical Debt
- [ ] Documentation Updates
- [ ] Other

## Description
Describe the maintenance task that needs to be performed.

## Justification
Why is this maintenance necessary? What are the benefits?

## Scope
What areas of the codebase will be affected?

## Estimated Effort
- [ ] Small (< 1 day)
- [ ] Medium (1-3 days)
- [ ] Large (1+ weeks)

## Risks
Are there any risks or potential side effects from this maintenance?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, references, or related issues here.
